description: Style Note Look classy and desirable in this elegant polo tee from timberland. Made of organic cotton, it is stylish, and ensures all-day comfort. Team it with your favourite jeans or chinos and casual footwear for an irresistible look.Product DetailsBlue polo T-shirt, has a cutaway collar, three buttoned placket, branding on the left chest, short sleeves, back yoke and vented hemlineMaterial and Care 100% cottonMachine wash coldTumble dry lowUse warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
